examples: More difficult, in the moment, is discerning precisely how these lean times are affecting society's character.
Even the most accomplished writers show their work-in-progress to discerning readers.
See how well we do in discerning the babies' emotions.
Of course, this raises the question, what exactly the discerning chap or chap-ette wear to the event?
Because they are the primary tool we use for discerning the intentions of those around us.
